source: cove-original (design 047 §4 OR composition); accepts the active-tab URL when it either contains the gold (url_in) OR normalizes equal to it (url_match_normalized), so a trailing slash or tracking param does not fail a correct navigation

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to quit' 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to make new document with properties {URL:"https://www.cove.invalid/blank"}' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to set URL of front document to "{URL}"' -e 'delay 1' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Safari" to return URL of front document
